untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-leg options pricing comparison (near-term vs longer-term combination prices and their ratio), strike price spacing analysis, and time-to-expiration windows that cannot be directly expressed with available price/technical indicators. Options pricing data, strike selection logic, and combination leg pricing are not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy mapping: hvol_20 for volatility requirement, price_pos_20 for price midway between strikes (40-60 range), atr_14 for strike separation proxy. However, core signal logic depends on options contract pricing relationships and legs that require dedicated options data structures not available in technical indicator format. The 2-3 month expiration window and >0.5 price ratio between combinations cannot be operationalized without explicit options contract data.
